title: The Power of Unown - Unown Rework
description: A Cobblemon data pack that reworks Unown to be somewhat relevant.
body:
**The Power of Unown - Unown Rework** is a Cobblemon datapack that aims to bring some relevance to the Symbol pokemon, **Unown**. Since it demonstrates an innate Hidden Power, it can now learn to express its power in more ways, _learning most moves with "Power" in the name!_

- **Every Symbol is Unique:** At level 30, Unown also learn a unique Psychic-type move depending on its letter! 
- **The Power of Unown** must be installed as a datapack in order to function properly.

Enjoy this datapack? Be sure to check out my other work: [Colorful Unown Shinies](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-unown-shinies)!

**Questions or Comments?**

Be sure to join Cobblemon's Discord and share your thoughts in "Ian's things" under the form channel named "content-zone-help"
